source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.



Position Overview
We’re looking for a Cold Call Beast! Someone with relentless energy, grit, and the ability to open doors that others can’t. You’ll be the front line of our growth, dialing, prospecting, and pitching Togal’s cutting-edge solution to contractors, estimators, and construction leaders across Florida and the U.S. This role is about hustle, persistence, and passion. If you thrive on competition, love chasing quotas, this is your chance to make a serious impact (and commission).

Key Responsibilities

 - Hammer the phones, cold call, email, and LinkedIn outreach daily to generate new qualified leads

 - Run high-energy, custom demos and presentations that get prospects excited about Togal

 - Drive pipeline growth by targeting Spanish- and English-speaking prospects across the U.S.

 - Consistently exceed activity metrics (calls, meetings, demos) and revenue targets

 - Build relationships with contractors, estimators, and construction execs to open new opportunities

 - Serve as a trusted advisor, demonstrating deep product knowledge and industry insight

 - Provide frontline feedback on messaging, objections, and market trends to sharpen our sales playbook

 - Represent Togal at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities



Qualifications

 - Strong communicator

 - 2+ years in outbound sales, business development, or SDR/BDR role

 - Experience in construction with a deep understanding of the industry

 - Proven cold calling, not afraid of 100+ dials/day

 - Strong presentation, negotiation, and closing skills

 - Incredible energy, persistence, and ability to handle rejection like a pro

 - Ability to engage technical and non-technical audiences effectively

 - Tech-savvy with experience using CRM and sales engagement tools



Nice to Have

 - Experience in construction tech or SaaS

 - Startup experience



What We Offer

 - Base salary + Incentive Plan

 - Health, dental, and vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO and remote flexibility

 - Opportunity to grow your career at a fast-paced AI startup

 - Collaborative and innovative work environment

We are an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse team. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds who are passionate about using technology to transform the construction industry.

Join us in revolutionizing pre-construction estimating with the power of AI!

source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.



Key Responsibilities



Relationship Management 

 - Build strong relationships with customers, understanding their goals and ensuring they are met through the platform

 - Conduct regular check-ins to monitor usage and overall satisfaction

 - Act as the primary point of contact for a portfolio of customers
   

Customer Support and Success 

 - Respond to support requests in a timely and professional manner

 - Troubleshoot issues and coordinate with the product team when necessary

 - Maintain records of customer interactions and feedback

Retention and Growth 

 - Monitor usage and identify churn risks early, addressing them with tailored support

 - Identify upsell and renewal opportunities and collaborate with the sales team to execute them

Customer Support and Success 

 - Respond to support requests in a timely and professional manner

 - Troubleshoot issues and coordinate with the product team when necessary

 - Maintain records of customer interactions and feedback



Collaboration and Feedback 

 - Provide customer insights to product and engineering teams to help shape product direction

 - Share trends, wins, and blockers with the broader customer success and sales teams
   




Qualifications

 - Experience in customer success, account management, or a client-facing SaaS role

 - SaaS experience with a strong acumen for product knowledge 

 - Strong communication and relationship-building skills

 - Ability to troubleshoot issues and explain technical concepts to non-technical users

 - Experience working with CRM or customer success platforms

 - Highly organized and proactive with a customer-first mindset

 - Located in CT/MT/PT time zone



Nice to Have

 - Experience in construction tech or working with AEC clients is a plus
   

What We Offer

 - Base salary + Incentive Plan

 - Health, dental, and vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO and remote flexibility

 - Opportunity to grow your career at a fast-paced AI startup

 - Collaborative and innovative work environment
   

We are an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse team. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds who are passionate about using technology to transform the construction industry.

Join us in revolutionizing pre-construction estimating with the power of AI!

source_jobs.title: Product Specialist
source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.



Position Overview

We’re looking for a driven and detail-oriented Implementation Specialist to help us support and scale our growing customer base. This role is well-suited for someone looking to build a strong foundation in customer-facing tech, eager to expand their skills, take ownership, and contribute to meaningful results early on. You thrive in fast-moving environments, take initiative, and enjoy being hands-on with customers.

This role requires a strong technical foundation and the ability to quickly grasp and adapt to evolving product features. You’ll serve as a key partner to new and existing customers, guiding them through onboarding and helping them get the most value from Togal.AI http://Togal.AI. You’ll customize training based on each customer’s needs, collaborate across teams, and play a critical role in ensuring smooth adoption, long-term engagement, and customer satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities

 - Lead onboarding webinars to introduce new customers to Togal.AI http://Togal.AI’s core functionality.

 - Collaborate with customers to design and execute customized training plans for effective adoption.

 - Deliver focused training sessions tailored to trade-specific workflows.

 - Maintain up-to-date training materials including user guides and video tutorials.

 - Host regular “Office Hours” to support customer engagement and address questions.

 - Proactively engage new users to drive adoption and surface potential roadblocks early.

 - Act as a product expert to guide customers in optimizing their use of Togal.AI http://Togal.AI.

 - Partner with Customer Support to track, report, and resolve onboarding issues or bugs.

 - Work closely with the Customer Success team to ensure customer satisfaction and goal alignment.

 - Continuously refine onboarding processes in line with product updates and customer feedback.



Qualifications

 - Construction industry HIGHLY experience preferred

 - Experience in customer onboarding, implementation, training, or support, ideally in a SaaS or technical environment.

 - Strong communication and presentation skills.

 - Ability to simplify complex concepts and tailor content to different user personas.

 - Experience in the construction or building technology industry a plus

 - Self-starter with a customer-first mindset and proactive problem-solving skills.

 - Proficient in creating training content and documentation.

 - Comfortable collaborating cross-functionally with product, support, and success teams.



Nice to Have

 - Experience in construction tech or working with AEC clients is a plus



What We Offer

 - Competitive base salary

 - Health, dental, and vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO and remote flexibility

 - Opportunity to grow your career at a fast-paced AI startup

 - Collaborative and innovative work environment

We are an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse team. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds who are passionate about using technology to transform the construction industry.

Join us in revolutionizing pre-construction estimating with the power of AI!

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Estimating
source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the roadmap: You decide what gets built and when, informed by user research, data, and business priorities. You defend your decisions with evidence, not opinions. Make trade-offs between new features, improvements, and technical debt. Get comfortable saying no.

 - Ship fast, learn faster: move in weeks, not quarters. Build MVPs, validate ideas with minimal engineering effort before full investment. You will break work down with your cross functional team, ship early, test with real users, and iterate rapidly based on immediate feedback.

 - Conduct in depth discovery, directly with your users: Spend time with estimators, watch how they work, understand their pain.

 - Measure impact: Define success metrics, analyze user behavior and make data-driven decisions.


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of Product Management experience in B2B SaaS: ideally in complex, data heavy workflows (e.g., FinTech, ERPs, Logistics, or Construction Tech). You understand that "simple" UI requires deep backend thought.

 - Builder Mindset: You don’t wait for perfect, you ship MVPs and learn. You'll figure out what to build first, what can wait, and what we shouldn't build at all.

 - AI-minded: You ask "can this be done by AI?" a lot. And you are keen to figure out how it can be done by AI.

 - Strong Sense of Ownership: If something is blocked or you find a problem - you fix it.

 - Discovery First: You talk to users before building anything. You validate assumptions with evidence, not just ship what stakeholders ask for.

 - Bonus: Experience in the Construction, Architecture, or Engineering (AEC) space is a massive plus, but not required if you are a fast learner.


WHY TOGAL

 - Market position: We are growing very quickly and gaining market share. Contractors trust us. Estimating is the natural expansion - we're not starting from zero.

 - Timing: Series A, profitable, growing fast. We're hiring 75+ people in 2026. You're joining early enough to shape the company, late enough that we have traction.

 - Innovation: We don’t use "AI" as a buzzword. We are applying deep learning to a massive industry that hasn't changed in decades.

 - Autonomy: You'll own this product. You decide what to build, when to ship, and how to measure success. We don't micromanage.

 - Team: You'll work with our Head of Product, the Engineering Manager for your group, engineers who ship daily, and a design team that understands construction workflows. Small team, high impact.

 - Real users: In person shadowing sessions and research trips. Contractors are brutally honest. If your product sucks, they'll tell you. If it's good, they'll pay for it and tell their friends.



We are an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse team. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds who are passionate about using technology to transform the construction industry.

Join us in revolutionizing pre-construction estimating with the power of AI!

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Campaign Manager
source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.




ROLE SUMMARY

We’re hiring an Enterprise Campaign Manager to build and run highly targeted go-to-market campaigns for larger accounts. This role will focus on one-to-one and one-to-few outreach programs that help us break into strategic accounts, engage executive buyers, and improve the effectiveness of our outbound motion.

This person will sit at the center of sales, marketing, and GTM operations. They will coordinate personalized, multi-channel campaigns across email, LinkedIn, phone, direct mail, and supporting landing pages/content. They will also help create the structure, reporting, and feedback loops needed to improve campaign performance over time.

This is not a broad brand marketing role and not a pure marketing ops role. It is a hands-on role focused on enterprise campaign design, orchestration, and measurement.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build and manage one-to-one and one-to-few campaigns for strategic and enterprise accounts

 - Develop account-specific and persona-specific outreach strategies

 - Coordinate multi-channel campaign execution across email, LinkedIn, phone, ringless voicemail, direct mail, and other creative tactics

 - Partner with sales leadership, BDRs, AEs, and GTM operators to improve account penetration and meeting generation

 - Help shape executive-first outreach motions, especially for VP- and Director-level buyers

 - Translate campaign goals into clear messaging, CTA strategy, sequencing, and follow-up plans

 - Work cross-functionally with marketing and content teams to identify and develop the assets needed to support campaigns

 - Help drive campaign inputs for persona-based and trade-based landing pages

 - Define campaign success metrics and track performance across channels

 - Partner with GTM ops / RevOps / data resources to improve attribution, reporting, and campaign visibility

 - Analyze results and recommend improvements to targeting, messaging, offers, and channel mix

 - Build repeatable playbooks for strategic account campaigns and share learnings across the GTM team




DELIVERABLES

 - Strategic account campaign plans

 - Persona-specific messaging and sequencing recommendations

 - Multi-channel outbound campaign briefs

 - Campaign reporting and performance analysis

 - Recommendations on targeting, campaign structure, and offers

 - Cross-functional briefs for needed assets, landing pages, and supporting collateral

 - Playbooks for repeatable enterprise outreach programs




QUALIFICATIONS

 - Experience building and running targeted outbound or ABM-style campaigns for larger or more complex accounts

 - Strong understanding of multi-channel campaign strategy, including email, LinkedIn, phone, and direct mail

 - Comfortable working closely with sales teams and translating campaign strategy into pipeline activity

 - Experience measuring campaign performance and using data to improve results

 - Strong project management and cross-functional coordination skills

 - Able to operate in a fast-moving environment where systems, messaging, and process are still being built

 - Strong written communication and messaging instincts

 - Experience with sales and marketing to

source_jobs.title: Director of Revops
source_jobs.description:
We are an innovative technology company providing a cutting-edge, AI-powered cloud platform for the construction industry. Created by industry experts with deep estimating experience, our software dramatically streamlines the pre-construction process. Our solution uses advanced machine learning to automate traditionally time-consuming takeoff tasks, helping estimators work up to 80% faster while reducing costly errors.

Our collaborative platform enables real-time teamwork, instant drawing analysis, and features a revolutionary conversational AI interface that transforms how professionals interact with construction plans. Founded by construction industry veterans, our award-winning application automates the takeoff process, enabling estimators to analyze blueprints in seconds rather than hours or days.




YOU


YOU HAVE A BACKGROUND IN THE TECHNICAL SIDE OF GTM, YOU’VE BEEN SPENDING FREE TIME TESTING THE TRUE ABILITY OF AI TOOLS, AND YOU’RE LOOKING FOR A NEXT GEN COMPANY WHERE YOU HAVE A BIG CANVAS TO PUT YOUR KNOWLEDGE TO USE.




THE ROLE

This is a foundational hire - you'll be the person who makes sure the revenue org is operating off clean, trusted numbers, that our GTM tech stack works as a system, and that the definitions of what we measure are consistent across sales, marketing, finance, and product.

Right now we have strong infrastructure in place: our data warehouse is largely built out, Amplitude is piped in, and an external RevOps agency has been helping us clean up quote-to-cash across Salesforce, Maxio, and our marketing stack. What we don't yet have is a senior internal owner who can govern that system, establish canonical metrics, and turn data into decisions.

You'll work closely with our GTM engineers, our external agency, and our executive team. You'll own the defining layer - what things mean and why - and you'll be the DRI for how the revenue org uses data to operate.

 


WHAT YOU WILL OWN

Metric definitions and data governance

 - Establish and enforce canonical definitions for ARR, MQL, activation, churn, and other core revenue metrics across GTM and finance

 - Serve as the internal arbiter when numbers don’t match - find the root cause and fix it at the source

 - Own the data dictionary and make sure documentation stays current as the business evolves

 - We're building our infrastructure and data for the purpose of leveraging AI platforms.

GTM tech stack

 - Own the GTM tech stack: Hubspot, Maxio, marketing automation, enrichment tools, and the connections between them

 - Manage vendor relationships and make build vs. buy decisions on tooling

 - Partner with our GTM engineers on technical execution - you set direction, they build

 - Manage the relationship with our external RevOps agency and oversee the handoff of the quote-to-cash build

Reporting and analytics

 - Own pipeline reporting, conversion analysis, and revenue forecasting inputs for the executive team

 - Build and maintain dashboards that give the sales and marketing teams self-serve visibility into what’s working

 - Surface the data that drives decisions - not just the data that answers questions after the fact

Cross-functional alignment

 - Be the connective tissue between sales, marketing, CS, finance, and product on anything data or systems related

 - Partner with the product team to make sure product usage signals in Amplitude are surfaced to the revenue org in useful ways

 - Bring the same rigor to product-side metrics that you bring to GTM - activation, engagement, and expansion signals matter as much as pipeline

 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or a closely related role at a B2B SaaS company

 - Deep fluency in the GTM tech stack - Salesforce or HubSpot, marketing automation, billing systems, and how they connect

 - Genuinely data literate: comfortable writing SQL, reading data models, and having an informed conversation with a data engineer about what’s possible - you

notes: No tech roles posted, but company description mentions AI-powered cloud platform
